allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); stable=[v for v in vs if '-' not in v and v.startswith\('12.'\)]; print\(stable[-5:] if stable else vs[-5:]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=[v for v in vs if v.startswith\('15.'\) and '-' not in v]; print\(s[-8:]\)")
Bash(aws --profile giftshop --region ap-south-1 cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name IdfPortalStack --query "Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey=='CloudFrontDomain'].OutputValue" --output text)

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"  {i['slug']['S']}: up={i['up']['N']} down={i['down']['N']}\\"\) for i in d.get\('Items',[]\)]; print\(f\\"  count={d.get\('Count',0\)}\\"\)")

Bash(aws --profile giftshop --region ap-south-1 dynamodb scan --table-name ideafactory-votes --filter-expression "begins_with\(pk, :p\)" --expression-attribute-values '{":p":{"S":"VOTER#"}}' --output json)

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('Items',[]\); print\(f'  total_voter_rows={len\(items\)}'\); [print\(f\\"  {i['pk']['S'][:80]} dir={i.get\('direction',{}\).get\('N','?'\)}\\"\) for i in items[:5]]")
